examples: The door is beautifully made in solid teak.
Only teak matches oak's expansion coefficient and stays watertight.
The cost is similar to that of teak, but the maple is more durable and easier to keep clean.
Natural materials such as teak, glass and stone create a mood of Zen-like tranquility.
Wrought iron, teak and wicker look-alikes will last through umpteen cold snaps, deluges and blizzards.
